title: lastrea illicita
intro: Lastrea illicita, also known as the illicit fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae, characterized by its unique fern-like leaves with spores. Traditionally, Lastrea illicita has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Lastrea illicita include the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of Lastrea illicita include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
